name: Count
description: This node counts the number of records in the incoming Dataframe and puts the count into result page.
input: It accepts a DataFrame as input from the previous Node
output: The incoming DataFrame is sent to the output

fields.name: variable
fields.title: Variable Name
fields.description: Name of the Variable in which the count is stored

fields.name: printCount
fields.title: PrintCount
fields.description: Print the count into result page.
